creator: jw@innerewut.de
text:
This is a new port for rubyforge, a small set of scripts to interact with the Rubyforge Gem server. It is needed by hoe, a suite for creating new Gems, that I will soon submit as a seperate port.

Fix: inline shar:
How-To-Repeat: Install the port from http://blog.innerewut.de/files/rubygem-rubyforge.tar.gz  or http://blog.innerewut.de/files/rubygem-rubyforge.shar
